news.title:
SRF Ltd. saw a Rs. 21.9 crore NSE block trade for ~91,217 shares.
The shares were traded at a price of Rs. 2402.0 each.
news.summary:
SRF Ltd. saw a Rs. 21.9 crore NSE block trade for ~91,217 shares.
The shares were traded at a price of Rs. 2402.0 each.

news.title:
SRF and Atul may face challenges due to the West Asia conflict.
Navin Fluorine and Tata Chemicals are expected to have minimal impact.
news.summary:
SRF and Atul may face challenges due to the West Asia conflict.
Navin Fluorine and Tata Chemicals are expected to have minimal impact.

news.title:
Emkay Global revises portfolio, adding Infosys, HCL Tech, Indus Towers, SRF; exits Mphasis, Sun Pharma, Gravita.
It turns marginally overweight on IT sector, citing attractive valuations post AI sell-off; sees 6.5-18.3% return potential.
news.summary:
Emkay Global revises portfolio, adding Infosys, HCL Tech, Indus Towers, SRF; exits Mphasis, Sun Pharma, Gravita.
It turns marginally overweight on IT sector, citing attractive valuations post AI sell-off; sees 6.5-18.3% return potential.

news.title: Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight rating for SRF, raises target price to ₹2,209.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight rating for SRF, raises target price to ₹2,209.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight on SRF, Navin Fluorine due to refrigerant price pressure.
Refrigerant prices may drop 25%; EPS impact estimated at 8-13% with mixed analyst sentiment on both stocks.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight on SRF, Navin Fluorine due to refrigerant price pressure.
Refrigerant prices may drop 25%; EPS impact estimated at 8-13% with mixed analyst sentiment on both stocks.

news.title:
SRF shares dropped 3.9% after promoter Kama Holdings approved selling a 3% stake by March 2027.
Kama's stake sale may lower its holding below 50%. SRF recently posted a 59.7% profit rise in Q3.
news.summary:
SRF shares dropped 3.9% after promoter Kama Holdings approved selling a 3% stake by March 2027.
Kama's stake sale may lower its holding below 50%. SRF recently posted a 59.7% profit rise in Q3.

news.title:
Kama Holdings to sell 3% stake in SRF via open market.
Transaction anticipated to conclude by March 2024.
news.summary:
Kama Holdings to sell 3% stake in SRF via open market.
Transaction anticipated to conclude by March 2024.

news.title:
US tariff reduction from 50% to 18% under the 2026 trade deal boosts Indian chemical exports, valued at $5.7B in FY24.
Beneficiaries include Aarti Industries, SRF, UPL, Aether Industries, and Navin Fluorine, all reporting significant YoY revenue growth.
news.summary:
US tariff reduction from 50% to 18% under the 2026 trade deal boosts Indian chemical exports, valued at $5.7B in FY24.
Beneficiaries include Aarti Industries, SRF, UPL, Aether Industries, and Navin Fluorine, all reporting significant YoY revenue growth.

news.title:
India-US trade deal cuts tariffs on Indian chemical exports to 18% from 50%, boosting competitiveness.
Stocks to watch: Aarti Industries, Navin Fluorine, Gujarat Fluorochemicals, Laxmi Organic, Vinati Organics, SRF Ltd.
news.summary:
India-US trade deal cuts tariffs on Indian chemical exports to 18% from 50%, boosting competitiveness.
Stocks to watch: Aarti Industries, Navin Fluorine, Gujarat Fluorochemicals, Laxmi Organic, Vinati Organics, SRF Ltd.

news.title:
US cuts tariffs on Indian exports to 18% from 50%, benefiting SRF, Navin Fluorine, and Neogen Chemicals.
HPCL, Reliance, and ONGC focus on crude sourcing; Reliance may secure discounts, while ONGC awaits $500M dividends.
news.summary:
US cuts tariffs on Indian exports to 18% from 50%, benefiting SRF, Navin Fluorine, and Neogen Chemicals.
HPCL, Reliance, and ONGC focus on crude sourcing; Reliance may secure discounts, while ONGC awaits $500M dividends.

news.title:
Jefferies identifies Adani Group as key beneficiary of India-US trade deal due to US exposure.
Other gainers include Sona BLW, Bharat Forge, Navin Fluorine, PI Industries, SRF, and Welspun Living.
news.summary:
Jefferies identifies Adani Group as key beneficiary of India-US trade deal due to US exposure.
Other gainers include Sona BLW, Bharat Forge, Navin Fluorine, PI Industries, SRF, and Welspun Living.

news.title:
SRF Ltd Q3 FY26: Revenue fell 6% to ₹3,713 cr; PAT down 60% to ₹433 cr.
Chemicals saw 22% growth despite Chinese pricing; packaging revenue fell 3%.
news.summary:
SRF Ltd Q3 FY26: Revenue fell 6% to ₹3,713 cr; PAT down 60% to ₹433 cr.
Chemicals saw 22% growth despite Chinese pricing; packaging revenue fell 3%.

news.title:
Persistent Systems, Wipro, SRF, Coforge, GCPL to trade ex-dividend next week with payouts ranging from Rs 4 to Rs 22.
Other firms like United Spirits, KEI Industries, and Zensar among others also declare dividends with varying record dates.
news.summary:
Persistent Systems, Wipro, SRF, Coforge, GCPL to trade ex-dividend next week with payouts ranging from Rs 4 to Rs 22.
Other firms like United Spirits, KEI Industries, and Zensar among others also declare dividends with varying record dates.

news.title:
SRF Ltd. declared a dividend of 50, amounting to 4/share, with an ex-date of Jan 27, 2026.
The company achieved a 156.3% total return over the past 5 years.
news.summary:
SRF Ltd. declared a dividend of 50, amounting to 4/share, with an ex-date of Jan 27, 2026.
The company achieved a 156.3% total return over the past 5 years.

news.title:
SRF Ltd faces Rs. 38.5 Cr duty penalty by Chennai customs over alleged HSN misclassification.
Claims of wrongful FTA benefits and export incentives; management plans legal challenge.
news.summary:
SRF Ltd faces Rs. 38.5 Cr duty penalty by Chennai customs over alleged HSN misclassification.
Claims of wrongful FTA benefits and export incentives; management plans legal challenge.

news.title:
Kalyan Jewellers fell 14% to Rs 389.1, marking its 8th straight loss, down 32.6% in 6 months. SRF dropped 6.4% post strong Q3 results.
Coforge dipped 6% to Rs 1,593, while Force Motors and Ceat fell 6.6% and 5.6%, respectively, despite Force Motors' strong sales.
news.summary:
Kalyan Jewellers fell 14% to Rs 389.1, marking its 8th straight loss, down 32.6% in 6 months. SRF dropped 6.4% post strong Q3 results.
Coforge dipped 6% to Rs 1,593, while Force Motors and Ceat fell 6.6% and 5.6%, respectively, despite Force Motors' strong sales.

news.title: SRF shares declined over 6% due to challenges from Chinese competitors.
news.summary: SRF shares declined over 6% due to challenges from Chinese competitors.

news.title: Citi reiterates 'Sell' on SRF, cuts target price to Rs 2,575.
news.summary: Citi reiterates 'Sell' on SRF, cuts target price to Rs 2,575.

news.title:
SRF Ltd reported a 59.6% rise in Q3 PAT to Rs 432.7 cr driven by strong chemical vertical performance.
Revenue stood at Rs 3,712.5 cr; board approved Rs 180 cr Dahej pharma unit and Rs 5/share interim dividend.
news.summary:
SRF Ltd reported a 59.6% rise in Q3 PAT to Rs 432.7 cr driven by strong chemical vertical performance.
Revenue stood at Rs 3,712.5 cr; board approved Rs 180 cr Dahej pharma unit and Rs 5/share interim dividend.

news.title:
SRF Ltd reappoints Mr. Pramod Gopaldas Gujarathi as Director, Safety & Environment for 3 years from April 1, 2026.
Mr. Gujarathi, aged 73, has 47 years of experience and was previously with Bayer Group for 18 years.
news.summary:
SRF Ltd reappoints Mr. Pramod Gopaldas Gujarathi as Director, Safety & Environment for 3 years from April 1, 2026.
Mr. Gujarathi, aged 73, has 47 years of experience and was previously with Bayer Group for 18 years.
